title: Elatostema cyrtandrifolium
intro: Elatostema cyrtandrifolium is a species of plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the Elatostema plant. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to aid in the management of fever and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Elatostema cyrtandrifolium include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Elatostema is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including coughs and colds.
